title: Survival power armor
description: A simple mod that lets nukacraft power armor be crafted in survival mode
body:
This is a simple mod that adds crafting recipies to power armor from the nukacraft mod using create and create nuclear.

I wont be making another version of this as it is a place holder for when a permanent option becomes available, but i might fix broken recipies.

have fun :)

CREATE, CREATE NUCLEAR, AND NUKACRAFT ARE REQUIRED OR THIS WONT WORK.

JEI is needed to see recipies.
